ship_slice: Ship as one vertical slice for cost widget: data contract, collector or tool adapter, backend API, deterministic evaluator, UI surface, tests, documentation, and operator runbook.
implementation_detail: Detect cost widget symptoms, thresholds, anomalies, and correlated events that affect disaster-recovery.
backend_scope: Add deterministic evaluators, metrics ingestion, and explainable findings for cost widget.
frontend_scope: Add health badges, charts, timelines, and affected-object drilldowns for cost widget.
api_contract: Expose authenticated API endpoints for Dashboard and Query Workbench cost widget health with pagination, freshness metadata, audit IDs, error codes, and export support.
data_model: cost-widget_disaster-recovery_health evidence, score, finding, recommendation, owner, suppression, audit event
deterministic_scope: Implement deterministic checks for cost widget disaster-recovery that can run without an LLM, emit reason codes, and preserve raw evidence.
agentic_scope: Allow agentic investigation only through registered tools for cost widget; read-only diagnostics are default, mutations require explicit approval, and every tool call is replayable.
interaction_model: Support inspect, compare, diagnose, dry-run, approve, execute, rollback-note, audit, and export workflows for cost widget.
cost_opportunity: Record any cost side effect for cost widget recommendations so non-cost changes do not create hidden spend regressions.
risk_controls: Require RBAC, scoped credentials, rate limits, stale-data detection, blast-radius summary, suppression policy, and rollback or recovery notes for cost widget.
telemetry_contract: Emit collection duration, freshness age, success/failure counts, rule evaluation count, AI/tool-call count when applicable, and user action audit metrics for cost widget.
test_plan: Add unit tests for evaluator logic, fixture tests for collected evidence, API contract tests, UI render/action tests, and one failure-path test for stale or missing cost widget data.
rollout_guardrail: Gate behind a feature flag, support read-only mode first, document required permissions, and add rollback or disable instructions before enabling cost widget health broadly.
docs_runbook: Document prerequisites, permissions, setup, known limits, common failure modes, triage commands, remediation approval path, and verification checks for cost widget.
acceptance_criteria: Given cost widget data exists, when the disaster-recovery health workflow runs, then Mayyam stores evidence, shows status, explains gaps, and exposes API/UI tests for the happy path and one failure path.
dependency: cost widget connector credentials, normalized resource identity, sync-run freshness, RBAC, audit logging
